title: ApiKeyScope
description: Formal permission scope strings for MIP API keys. Scopes follow the pattern '{resource}:{action}'. Organization-scoped keys may hold any of these scopes. Deployment-scoped keys are restricted to a subset appropriate for a single deployment profile.

scope_descriptions.credentials:issue: Issue new credentials via issuance flows
scope_descriptions.credentials:read: Read credential records and issuance status
scope_descriptions.applications:read: Read applicant records and vetting checks
scope_descriptions.applications:approve: Approve, reject, or request info on applicant records (reviewer lock required)
scope_descriptions.trust:read: Read trust profiles and trust sources
scope_descriptions.trust:admin: Full trust management including deletion and policy overrides
scope_descriptions.compliance:read: Read compliance profiles and system profiles
scope_descriptions.compliance:write: Create and manage custom compliance profiles
scope_descriptions.wallet:read: Read wallet registry and compatibility tables
scope_descriptions.wallet:write: Create and update wallet registry override entries
scope_descriptions.keys:read: Read cryptographic key metadata (never raw key material)
scope_descriptions.roles:write: Create and manage roles and permissions
scope_descriptions.notifications:send: Send notifications to users and devices
scope_descriptions.notifications:read: Read notification history and delivery results
scope_descriptions.admin:full: Superscope — grants all permissions within scope_type. Use with caution. Restricted to ORGANIZATION scope_type keys.

deployment_restricted_scopes.description: Scopes permitted for DEPLOYMENT scope_type API keys. All other scopes require ORGANIZATION scope_type.
